creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 161838
update www/qupzilla to 1.8.7

Update QupZilla ports to 1.8.7 which brings a number of bugfixes for the Qt5 build. KWallet support on for KDE5 is available as an option now that it is clear how KF5 ports will work (tested with area51). Also, change the conflict between variants to just be an install conflict to ease test builds.
